title: Blastwork
description: This mod improves Vanilla experience with explosives by adding more of them and making the interaction more immersive.
body:
# Blastwork

![Blocks and Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fb015ffa346ec494913ffcec4c11d14c7a87d1d_0.webp)

This mod expands Minecraft's vanilla explosive experience by adding new mechanics, making explosives more immersive and useful. Control power of explosions by charging barrels, control their side-effects by choosing different explosive barrel types, control blast delay of some barrels and so much more!

### Liked the mod? Found a bug? Have any questions? Send the feedback on our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/EWYzHpDE3D)
